title: Income Approach: A property has a selling price of 1.5 million and...
summary: Calculate NOI by subtracting operating expenses from rental income.
prompt: A property has a selling price of $1.5 million and a current NOI of $120,000. If the projected annual growth rate of NOI is 3%, calculate the value of the property in 5 years using the Gordon Growth Model.
solution: Step 1: Calculate future NOI: Future NOI = Current NOI × (1 + growth rate)^number of years = $120,000 × (1 + 0.03)^5 = $120,000 × 1.15927 = $139,113.24. Step 2: Calculate cap rate (based on current value): Cap Rate = NOI / Property Value = $120,000 / $1,500,000 = 0.08. Step 3: Value in 5 years = Future NOI / Cap Rate = $139,113.24 / 0.08 = $1,738,915.50.
